sol.interpretation: Exact pin reached; no final review JSON was emitted. This is not unavailable.

fable.interpretation: Exact pin reached; no final review JSON was emitted. This is not unavailable.

local_findings.description: The first three textual predicates overlapped doc-side S99 HyQ questions and could contaminate later retrieval evaluation.
local_findings.fix: The packet now includes every S99 HyQ question for the selected PDFs in semantic duplicate coverage, and the cohort uses visual predicates not expressed by those questions: Class A topology, exact 008/112 DIP patterns and visual slot distinction.

local_findings.description: all_pass returned true vacuously for an empty review list when called without prior shape validation.
local_findings.fix: all_pass now requires a non-empty review list; a deterministic regression test covers the case.

local_findings.description: The one-shot design review helper did not persist incomplete provider receipts before raising.
local_findings.fix: Both exact receipts are sealed in s204_kidde_visual_design_reviews_v1.json without rerunning either model.

residual_risk: No valid final frontier design-review verdict was obtained; execution remains bounded and fail-closed, and both frontier models independently author and cross-review every candidate during the actual canary.
